message:
Remove unused Dict import from embedding discovery script

The Dict type was imported from typing but never used in type
annotations (the script uses List, Optional, and Tuple instead).
Removing the unused import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@
 import urllib.parse
 import urllib.request
 import urllib.error
-from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple
+from typing import List, Optional, Tuple
 
 CUTOFF_DEFAULT = "2025-11-01"
 PIPELINE_TAG = "feature-extraction"
